creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #2)
> Adjust sqlite3 version requirement in www/firefox/Makefile then.

Version in Makefile should match one in configure.in where it is SQLITE_VERSION=3.8.10.1. And DBSTAT option requirement should be mentioned in UPDATING instead, see 20120726 entry for an example.

As reminded by koobs@ relying on PORTREVISION wouldn't work for ports users who already saved selected options.
